title.en: Next, there are a variety of precious resources...

content.en:
After a fierce bidding, this extradimensional elf was auctioned off by an extradimensional realm for 1.3 billion galanbol coins.

Next, there are a variety of precious resources that are auctioned.

Finally, resources that could help Ye Tian continue to refine the power of the transcendent dimension appeared.

"The next auction is the Immortal Golden Chalcedony Stone, which is a Kui Treasure that is born from a hundred drops of Immortal Golden Chalcedony to give birth to 10,000 extradimensional epochs and has a 1 percent chance of being born, which helps to refine the power of the extradimensional to the consummation realm, with a starting price of 2 billion Galanbol coins. "

The dove star god introduced.

Two billion Galanbo coins, this price is undoubtedly very expensive, more expensive than a half-step superdimensional elf in the transcendent realm, but the superdimensional elf may not be able to help a peak realm god comprehend the power of transcendence, and it can even be said that the hope is extremely low.

But the Immortal Golden Chalcedony Stone is different, this "710" is a real resource, which can greatly temper the power of the super dimension, once the power of the super dimension is tempered to the realm of perfection, the strength will skyrocket.

Therefore, it attracts any half-step extradimensional realm.

"That's it, you have to bid for it!"

Ye Tian thought secretly.

In order to participate in this auction, he has already exchanged a large number of Garanbao coins, so he is eligible to participate in the auction.

"1,100,000,000,000 Galanbao Coins!"

"1,500,000,000,000,000 Galanbao

A large number of half-step extra-dimensional realms are participating in the auction, after all, they all need it, even if some half-step extra-dimensional realms have not yet cultivated the power of super-dimensional to the Dacheng realm, but it is good to bid in advance!

However, if the price is too high, these half-step extradimensional realms will not continue to be auctioned.

After the price soared to three billion Galangemon coins, the half-step extradimensional realm of the auction was rare, but there were several extradimensional realms participating in the auction, and it was estimated that they were also bidding for the younger generations.

But the Extradimensional Realm is not stupid, they want to obtain this kind of resource more channels, and if the price is high, they will not want it.

Therefore, Ye Tian still has a great hope of winning the auction.

Four billion!

Billion!

In the end, Ye Tian won the auction of this immortal golden pith bead at a terrifying price of 5.6 billion gala blue treasure coins.

But Ye Tian knew very well that just one Immortal Golden Marrow Bead was definitely not enough, and he could not refine his superdimensional power to the consummation realm, but if he could bid for one, he would bid for one.

Slowly accumulating, you can always refine the power of the transcendent dimension to the realm of perfection.

Not long after, another auction item attracted Ye Tian's attention.

"The next auction item is the Extradimensional Origin Bead, this is the most suitable treasure for refining the superdimensional body in the half-step extradimensional realm, if it is called second, there is no superdimensional resource that can be called the first!"

The dove star god said.

"It turned out to be a superdimensional origin bead, this kind of treasure actually appeared in this auction, it can greatly save the time of refining the superdimensional body!"

"I'm very close to refining and completing the superdimensional body, if I get this superdimensional origin bead, I will definitely be able to complete the refining of the superdimensional body and break through to the superdimensional realm!"

A half-step superdimensional realm powerhouse who was only half a step away from the extradimensional realm said excitedly.

Super Dimensional Origin Bead!

Ye Tian had also heard of this treasure, it was very rare, but it was too suitable for refining the superdimensional body, if there were enough superdimensional origin beads, the superdimensional body could be easily refined, so as to advance to the superdimensional realm.

Unfortunately, this treasure is too rare and too difficult to get hold of.

Even in the realm of extra-dimensionality, it is not easy to find the extra-dimensional origin bead.

Of course, the price is naturally high.

The Dove Star Realm God has announced the starting price of the Extradimensional Origin Bead - 3 billion Gala Treasure Coins!

Therefore, the final transaction price may still be above 10 billion Galanbao coins.

After all, this kind of resource is not usually available at all, and it is worth paying more Galanbao coins!

Really.

In a short period of time, the auction price soared to more than seven billion Galanbol Coins, and there were still many half-step extradimensional realms participating in the auction.

Ye Tian is also one of the half-step extradimensional realms participating in the auction. []

Eight billion Galanbo Coins!

Nine billion Galanbao coins!

10 Billion Galanbo Coins!

At this moment, Ye Tian was also very nervous, because he didn't have much Garanbao coins.

In order to participate in this auction, he sold almost all of his resources, even those super secret treasures, and only then did he make up more than 10 billion blue treasure coins

It can be said that he has no treasures left in his body now, and it is only a fragment of a superdimensional dao soldier.

If the auction price is still soaring, he may not be able to bid.

Fortunately, when he quoted 10.6 billion Galanbao coins, the other half-step extradimensional realms stopped bidding one after another, obviously this price was too high, and they couldn't afford it.

In this way, this superdimensional origin bead completely belonged to Ye Tian.

When he is not qualified to bid for other treasures, even the cheapest treasures cannot afford to bid.

"The Super Dimensional Origin Bead, the Immortal Golden Marrow Bead, it's already very good to be able to bid for these two treasures!"

Ye Tian was satisfied.

However, he did not leave early, and continued to sit here and look at the auction items behind him, which also helped him to increase his knowledge.

After a period of time, the bidding items that start to be auctioned can even cause a crazy auction in the extradimensional realm.

For example, the auction of a superdimensional dao soldier directly caused many extradimensional realms to bid frantically, and finally won the auction at a price of 50 billion Galanbao coins.

......

"Next, the auction will start the finale item of this auction, there are three finale items, the first finale item is the super-dimensional Xuantian Dao fruit, the peak realm god can comprehend the super-dimensional power 100%, once this treasure is obtained, it is enough for a force to give birth to a super-dimensional realm in the future. "

The dove star god said.

At this time, the 3.8 realms of the extra-dimensional were all moved.

None of them have relatives or descendants? There are definitely a lot of them at the peak realm god level, even if they are given the superdimensional stripes on the superdimensional elves, the comprehension talent is not good, and there is no way to comprehend the superdimensional power.

No matter how many extradimensional elves are given, they may not be able to comprehend the power of extradimensionality.

But the super-dimensional Xuantian Dao Fruit is different, this treasure is 100% able to make the peak realm god comprehend the power of the super-dimensional, as long as the foundation is fine, then the future will become a super-dimensional realm.

"Super Dimensional Dao Fruit, there are such good things!"

Ye Tiandu was extremely excited, if he obtained this treasure, he would be able to let his wife break through to the extradimensional realm in the future!

But this is the finale item, and the starting price is definitely very high, and he is not eligible to participate in the auction at all.
